description_long: This is a classic steam-powered boat with a sleek, elongated hull and a prominent central smokestack, suggesting a vintage or historical design. The hull is painted a deep, glossy black, while the deck and upper structures feature a polished wood or metallic copper finish, giving it a refined and elegant appearance. The boat has a flat, open deck area at the bow and stern, with a raised section in the middle where the smokestack and possible engine compartment are located. Visible details include a rudder and propeller at the stern, as well as small railings and fixtures along the deck edges. The overall design is streamlined, with a pointed bow and rounded stern, suitable for calm urban waterways or display in a park or museum setting. The materials and construction suggest durability and a focus on both function and aesthetic appeal.
description: A vintage steam-powered boat with a glossy black hull, polished wood or copper deck, and a central smokestack. The design is elegant and streamlined, featuring open deck areas and detailed fixtures.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the boat, the central smokestack, and the glossy black hull with polished deck details.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed bow, central smokestack, and the symmetry of the deck layout.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the hull, deck, and stern details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the rounded stern, rudder, propeller, and the back of the central smokestack.
